summary: Completed comprehensive testing of iteration 9 features: Provider info gating (non-subscribed users see first name only, no phone/address/whatsapp), Reviews with photo upload (requires subscription), 'Cuidador' terminology (replaced all 'Negocio/Proveedor' occurrences), Admin metrics returning 6 months time-series data. Fixed remaining 'Proveedores' text in 3 files.

issues: Google Maps API error: RefererNotAllowedMapError - domain not authorized. This is a Google Cloud Console configuration issue, not a code bug.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/providers - non-authenticated users see full_name_hidden=true, phone=null, address=null
Backend: GET /api/providers - business_name shows only first word for non-subscribed users
Backend: GET /api/providers/{id} - non-authenticated users see contact_blocked=true
Backend: GET /api/providers/{id} - authenticated user without subscription still sees contact_blocked=true
Backend: POST /api/reviews/upload-photo - requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: POST /api/reviews/upload-photo - requires subscription (fails without subscription)
Backend: POST /api/reviews - requires subscription to create review
Backend: ReviewCreate model accepts photos array field
Backend: GET /api/admin/metrics - requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/admin/metrics - returns 6 months of time-series data
Backend: GET /api/admin/metrics - each month has users, providers, subscriptions, reviews counts
Backend: GET /api/providers - services contain pet_sizes array
Backend: GET /api/providers?service_type=alojamiento - filtering works
Backend: GET /api/providers?service_type=guarderia - filtering works
Backend: GET /api/providers?service_type=paseo - filtering works
Frontend: SearchSimple.jsx shows 'Cuidadores encontrados' (not 'Proveedores')
Frontend: Service tabs: Todos, Alojamiento, Guarderia, Paseo
Frontend: Pet size badges (Pequeno, Mediano, Grande) shown on provider cards
Frontend: Provider profile shows 'Nombre parcial' badge for partial name
Frontend: Provider profile contact section shows 'Suscribete para ver...' message
Frontend: Subscribe CTA 'Ver Planes' button appears when contact blocked
Frontend: Provider profile shows pet sizes per service
Frontend: Admin panel tab shows 'Cuidadores' instead of 'Proveedores'
Frontend: Admin panel metrics chart shows 6 months data
Frontend: RegisterProvider shows 'Registra tu Perfil de Cuidador'
Frontend: Navbar shows 'Registrar mi Perfil' (not 'Negocio')
Frontend: No 'Negocio' text anywhere in the app
Frontend: All 'Proveedores' text replaced with 'Cuidadores'
critical_code_review_comments: Google Maps API key needs domain authorization for https://provider-plan-system.preview.emergentagent.com - requires Google Cloud Console configuration

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All terminology and features working correctly

seed_data_creation: Using existing seed data: 5 providers with services containing pet_sizes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 features tested: (1) Provider info gating - non-subscribed users see first name only, no phone/address/whatsapp, contact_blocked=true. (2) Reviews require subscription - photo upload and review creation both require active subscription. (3) 'Cuidador' terminology - all 'Negocio' and 'Proveedor' text replaced with 'Cuidador/Cuidadores'. Fixed remaining occurrences in AdminPanel.jsx, Favorites.jsx, PaymentResult.jsx, Search.jsx. (4) Admin metrics returns 6 months time-series data. No subscribed user available for full contact testing. Admin credentials: admin@ucan.cl / admin123. All MongoDB Atlas data persisted.

features_tested.provider_info_gating_list: GET /api/providers masks data: full_name_hidden=true, phone=null, address=null, first word of business_name only
features_tested.photo_upload_endpoint: POST /api/reviews/upload-photo requires auth + subscription, rejects non-images
features_tested.admin_metrics_api: GET /api/admin/metrics returns 6 months time-series with users/providers/subscriptions/reviews
features_tested.cuidador_terminology_admin: AdminPanel shows 'Cuidadores' in tabs and stats
features_tested.pet_sizes_cards: Provider cards display pet size badges
features_tested.pet_sizes_profile: Provider profile shows pet sizes per service
features_tested.service_tabs: Todos, Alojamiento, Guarderia, Paseo tabs working
